name: houdini_color_curves
description: Samples N points along each red stripe's direction, snaps each to the nearest surface point, then connects them as a curve.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

class Houdini_Color_CurvesNode(BaseNode):
    name = "houdini_color_curves"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("geo_path",      "string", widget_type="text")
        self.add_input("red_threshold", "float",  widget_type="float", default=0.5)
        self.add_input("green_max",     "float",  widget_type="float", default=0.4)
        self.add_input("blue_max",      "float",  widget_type="float", default=0.4)
        self.add_input("num_samples",   "int",    widget_type="int",   default=50)
        self.add_output("result_path",  "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        geo_path    = inputs.get("geo_path", "")
        red_thresh  = float(inputs.get("red_threshold", 0.5))
        green_max   = float(inputs.get("green_max",     0.4))
        blue_max    = float(inputs.get("blue_max",      0.4))
        num_samples = int(inputs.get("num_samples",     50))

        if not geo_path:
            self.log_error("No geo path provided.")
            return {"result_path": "", "exec_out": True}

        try:
            bridge = get_bridge()

            node_info = bridge.node_info(geo_path)
            category  = node_info.get("category", "")

            if category == "Object":
                run_result = bridge.run_code(
                    f"n = hou.node('{geo_path}'); result = n.displayNode().path() if n and n.displayNode() else None"
                )
                input_sop = run_result.get("result") if run_result else None
                if not input_sop:
                    raise Exception(f"No display SOP found inside: {geo_path}")
                sop_context = geo_path
            elif category == "Sop":
                sop_context = "/".join(geo_path.rstrip("/").split("/")[:-1])
                input_sop   = geo_path
            else:
                raise Exception(f"Unsupported node category '{category}' at: {geo_path}")

            # ----------------------------------------------------------------
            # Step 1 — remove non-red points
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------
            vex_detect = (
                f'float r=v@Cd.r, g=v@Cd.g, b=v@Cd.b;\n'
                f'if(r<{red_thresh:.4f}||g>{green_max:.4f}||b>{blue_max:.4f})\n'
                f'    removepoint(0,@ptnum);'
            )
            detect_result = bridge.create_node(sop_context, "attribwrangle", "detect_red_points")
            detect_path   = detect_result["path"]
            bridge.connect_nodes(input_sop, detect_path, output=0, input_idx=0)
            bridge.set_parm(detect_path, "class",   2)
            bridge.set_parm(detect_path, "snippet", vex_detect)

            # ----------------------------------------------------------------
            # Step 2 — label connected components
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------
            conn_result = bridge.create_node(sop_context, "connectivity", "label_stripes")
            conn_path   = conn_result["path"]
            bridge.connect_nodes(detect_path, conn_path, output=0, input_idx=0)

            # ----------------------------------------------------------------
            # Step 3 — place N sample positions along each stripe's axis,
            #          snap each to the nearest red surface point in that class,
            #          skip duplicates, connect as one open polyline per class.
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------
            vex_build = (
                f'int npts=npoints(0);\n'
                f'if(npts==0) return;\n'
                f'int NBINS={num_samples};\n'
                f'\n'
                f'// Store original prim count so Step 4 can delete mesh polys\n'
                f'setdetailattrib(0,"orig_nprims",nprimitives(0),"set");\n'
                f'\n'
                f'// Find highest class index\n'
                f'int max_class=0;\n'
                f'for(int i=0;i<npts;i++){{\n'
                f'    int c=point(0,"class",i);\n'
                f'    if(c>max_class) max_class=c;\n'
                f'}}\n'
                f'\n'
                f'for(int cls=0;cls<=max_class;cls++){{\n'
                f'\n'
                f'    // Collect this class\n'
                f'    int pts[]={{}};\n'
                f'    for(int i=0;i<npts;i++)\n'
                f'        if(point(0,"class",i)==cls) append(pts,i);\n'
                f'    int n=len(pts);\n'
                f'    if(n<2) continue;\n'
                f'\n'
                f'    // O(n) bounding box -> longest axis -> two extreme points\n'
                f'    float mnx=1e9,mxx=-1e9,mny=1e9,mxy=-1e9,mnz=1e9,mxz=-1e9;\n'
                f'    for(int i=0;i<n;i++){{\n'
                f'        float px=point(0,"Px",pts[i]),py=point(0,"Py",pts[i]),pz=point(0,"Pz",pts[i]);\n'
                f'        if(px<mnx)mnx=px; if(px>mxx)mxx=px;\n'
                f'        if(py<mny)mny=py; if(py>mxy)mxy=py;\n'
                f'        if(pz<mnz)mnz=pz; if(pz>mxz)mxz=pz;\n'
                f'    }}\n'
                f'    int ac=0;\n'
                f'    float rx=mxx-mnx,ry=mxy-mny,rz=mxz-mnz;\n'
                f'    if(ry>=rx&&ry>=rz) ac=1;\n'
                f'    else if(rz>=rx&&rz>=ry) ac=2;\n'
                f'\n'
                f'    int pta=pts[0],ptb=pts[0];\n'
                f'    float lo=1e9,hi=-1e9;\n'
                f'    for(int i=0;i<n;i++){{\n'
                f'        float v;\n'
                f'        if(ac==0) v=point(0,"Px",pts[i]);\n'
                f'        else if(ac==1) v=point(0,"Py",pts[i]);\n'
                f'        else v=point(0,"Pz",pts[i]);\n'
                f'        if(v<lo){{lo=v;pta=pts[i];}} if(v>hi){{hi=v;ptb=pts[i];}}\n'
                f'    }}\n'
                f'\n'
                f'    float ax=point(0,"Px",pta),ay=point(0,"Py",pta),az=point(0,"Pz",pta);\n'
                f'    float bx=point(0,"Px",ptb),by=point(0,"Py",ptb),bz=point(0,"Pz",ptb);\n'
                f'\n'
                f'    // Place NBINS sample positions evenly along the axis (pta->ptb),\n'
                f'    // snap each to the nearest red surface point in this class.\n'
                f'    int prim=addprim(0,"polyline");\n'
                f'    int last_pt=-1;\n'
                f'    for(int s=0;s<NBINS;s++){{\n'
                f'        float t=float(s)/(NBINS-1);\n'
                f'        float sx=ax+t*(bx-ax), sy=ay+t*(by-ay), sz=az+t*(bz-az);\n'
                f'\n'
                f'        // Nearest red surface point to this sample\n'
                f'        float best_d=1e18;\n'
                f'        int best=-1;\n'
                f'        for(int i=0;i<n;i++){{\n'
                f'            float px=point(0,"Px",pts[i]),py=point(0,"Py",pts[i]),pz=point(0,"Pz",pts[i]);\n'
                f'            float dx=px-sx,dy=py-sy,dz=pz-sz;\n'
                f'            float d=dx*dx+dy*dy+dz*dz;\n'
                f'            if(d<best_d){{best_d=d;best=pts[i];}}\n'
                f'        }}\n'
                f'        if(best<0||best==last_pt) continue;  // skip duplicates\n'
                f'        last_pt=best;\n'
                f'        addvertex(0,prim,best);  // vertex points to existing surface point\n'
                f'    }}\n'
                f'}}'
            )
            build_result = bridge.create_node(sop_context, "attribwrangle", "build_curves")
            build_path   = build_result["path"]
            bridge.connect_nodes(conn_path, build_path, output=0, input_idx=0)
            bridge.set_parm(build_path, "class",   0)  # detail
            bridge.set_parm(build_path, "snippet", vex_build)

            # ----------------------------------------------------------------
            # Step 4 — delete original mesh polygons, keep only the curves.
            # Primitives with index < orig_nprims are the original mesh polys;
            # everything above are the new open polylines.
            # ----------------------------------------------------------------
            vex_clean = (
                'int orig=detail(0,"orig_nprims",0);\n'
                'if(@primnum<orig) removeprim(0,@primnum,1);'
            )
            clean_result = bridge.create_node(sop_context, "attribwrangle", "remove_mesh_polygons")
            clean_path   = clean_result["path"]
            bridge.connect_nodes(build_path, clean_path, output=0, input_idx=0)
            bridge.set_parm(clean_path, "class",   1)  # primitives
            bridge.set_parm(clean_path, "snippet", vex_clean)

            bridge.set_display_flag(clean_path, True)
            bridge.set_render_flag(clean_path,  True)
            bridge.layout_children(sop_context)

            return {"result_path": clean_path, "exec_out": True}

        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"houdini_color_curves failed: {str(e)}")
            return {"result_path": "", "exec_out": True}

def register_node():
    return Houdini_Color_CurvesNode
